description.value:
Wild, aggressive creatures appearing as tall, attractive nude humans with horse hooves or soaking wet shaggy horse with dog teeth. Can switch forms at will. Guard waterways from deep ones.

Category: Folklore Monster

HP: — | DB: — | Build: — | Move: 8 / 12 (swimming)

Attacks

AttackSkillDamage
Unarmed or club/sickle (human form)60%1D3+DB or by weapon
Kick and bite (horse form)60%DB

Armor: None

Skills: Scent 75%, Stealth 60%, Swim 100%

Sanity Loss: 1/1D6 (horse form); 1/1D3 (human form with hooves noticed); 0/1D2 (transforming)

Special Abilities

  • Gate - fully submerged in water, create gate to Tír na nÓg (1 MP); 5 additional MP to carry rider
  • Drown - capable of breathing underwater, enjoy drowning foes
  • Human form: tackle opponent into water, hold under
  • Horse form: opposed POW check to compel target to mount; once mounted, target cannot dismount without assistance
  • Shapeshift at will
  • Speak Brythonic in harsh, guttural monosyllables (human form)
  • If slain, dissolve into greenish oily jelly smelling of damp earth
